scripts.build: next build && cp public/_headers out/ && cp public/_redirects out/ && cp vercel.json out/ && mkdir -p out/_functions && cp "public/_functions/[[path]].js" out/_functions/
scripts.release:zip: pnpm run build && rm -rf out/images/menu && ZIP_NAME="broadwaykebab-static-build-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M).zip" && rm -f "$ZIP_NAME" && (cd out && zip -r "../$ZIP_NAME" .) && echo "Created $ZIP_NAME"
scripts.deploy:vercel: pnpm run build && echo 'Upload out/ directory to Vercel'
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm run build && echo 'Upload out/ directory to Cloudflare Pages'
